basics.targetRole: Target: AI Coding–Related Design / Engineering Management
basics.tagline: 22+ years in tech and management; led Hipobuy overseas app from 0 to 344K+ downloads; strong use of AI to boost development efficiency.

highlight.title: Top Achievement

products.name: OpihPda
products.desc: Professional factory procurement and warehouse management app; full ownership from requirements to release.

products.name: Hipobuy
products.desc: Overseas procurement app for global markets; published on App Store and Google Play; led development and launch.

metrics.play: Google Play (last ~180 days): installed users grew from ~10K to ~65–70K with sustained growth.
metrics.appstore: App Store (through Mar 2026): 344K+ cumulative iPhone downloads; daily downloads rose sharply in late period.

highlight.aiNote: Used Cursor, v0, Claude code and other AI tools to significantly improve development and design efficiency.

items.summary: Led mini-program development and ops for Xinmeiye and Ruiyanling; AI-driven marketing for beauty; nearly 1,000 stores onboarded.
Smart community app, video intercom (WebRTC), Chaozhiwei ERP supply chain, smart access, vending machines; technical decisions and team leadership.
Backend R&D and technical management; led IoT projects including Duzun Tanba.
OA/ERP presales, implementation and consulting; government and enterprise office systems.

skills.title: Key Skills
skills.lead: AI-aided development (Cursor, v0, Claude code), architecture and design, cross-platform app (Flutter), project and team management.
skills.domain: ERP, smart community, IoT, e‑commerce and supply chain, smart hardware.
